explanations.12: The useBlogPost() hook gives us an object with an isBlogPostPage property that tells us if we're viewing a single blog post page versus a list of posts.
explanations.13: This returns a CSS class name only when we're in list view (not on a single post page), otherwise it returns undefined which means no extra styling is applied.
explanations.25: The && operator here means 'only render the RelatedPosts component if isBlogPostPage is true', so related posts only show on individual post pages, not in lists.
